summary: Code quality is solid (proper set -euo pipefail, die() error handling, shellcheck compliance, pinned action refs, least-privilege permissions), but delivery is **incomplete**: fixture files (fixtures/run1.xml, run2.xml, run1.json, run2.json) referenced at run-act-tests.sh:42-43, 91-106 are missing. Test file (tests/aggregate.bats) is excluded per instructions but those fixtures are data, not tests. XML parsing fragility: attribute extraction via awk (lines 71-89) scans line-by-line; compact/multiline XML may fail. Duplication in run-act-tests.sh case_* functions (lines 92-200): repeated pattern of setup→run_act→check exit→append_section→verify succeeded could refactor into helper. Hard-coded expected values in assertions (e.g. line 133) make tests brittle to intentional behavior changes.
